name: op_partial_repaint_css
description: PARTIAL REPAINT (css override): changing ONE node's background must produce a BOUNDED, correctly-scoped partial repaint — not a full-frame redraw. reset_frame_counters + snapshot_frame establish the baseline; set_node_css_override recolors node 7 (one .box); get_frame_report then feeds the damage asserts. LIVENESS: assert_changed (damage non-empty AND pixels really differ vs the snapshot). SOUNDNESS: assert_damage_covers_changes (every changed pixel lies inside the reported damage). SCOPE: assert_work_bounded caps relayouts/dom-regens so a color-only change cannot masquerade as a full rebuild. DOM mirrors e2e/bug-dom-mutation-no-damage.json so node id 7 is a stable .box.
